name: Wailing Bell
descriptionTemplate: At turn start, draw [Arg1] less cards. Gain 1 Arithmetica for each Card played with Arithmetica Cost >= [Arg2], triggering up to [Arg3] {plural:[Arg3]|time|times} per turn.
lore: Ding, ding, the child is crying; Ding, ding, the child is screaming. Ding, ding, the child is wailing; Ding, ding, it's hungry, you know.
